name: Ultrafabrics Holdings Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ultrafabrics Holdings Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of synthetic leather in Japan. The company was formerly known as Daiichi Kasei Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Ultrafabrics Holdings Co.,Ltd. in October 2017. Ultrafabrics Holdings Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Hachioji, Japan.
